rationale: Educ. Code §32.151 defines terms for student data privacy in online educational services. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: "Covered information" means personally identifiable information or information that is linked to personally identifiable information, in any media or format, that is not publicly available
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; it governs student data privacy definitions.
